title: thelypteris humilis
intro: Thelypteris humilis, also known as the dwarf lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris humilis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and promote wound healing, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
